data.title: SharpLink Gaming Buys $463M in ETH, Becomes Largest Public ETH Holder
data.description:
SharpLink Gaming has emerged as the world’s largest publicly traded holder of Ethereum (ETH), after acquiring 176,271 ETH for $463 million.

data.title: JPMorgan Increases Target Prices for Bitcoin Mining Companies Amid Rising Profits
data.description: According to PANews, JPMorgan has raised the target prices for several Bitcoin mining companies, including CleanSpark, Riot Platforms, and MARA Holdings, reflecting the increase in Bitcoin prices and improved mining profits. The target price for CleanSpark (CLSK) has been increased from $12 to $14, Riot Platforms (RIOT) from $13 to $14, and MARA Holdings to $19. The bank maintains an 'overweight' rating for CleanSpark, IREN, and Riot Platforms, while keeping a 'neutral' rating for Cipher and MARA. Analysts have adjusted the expected Bitcoin spot price upward by 24% and increased the estimated network hash rate by 9%.

data.title: MicroStrategy Executives Acquire $1.3 Million in Preferred Shares
data.description: According to Odaily, several insiders at MicroStrategy have recently purchased approximately $1.3 million worth of the company's preferred shares. This acquisition highlights the confidence of the company's leadership in its financial strategies and future prospects.

data.title: Cardano Founder Proposes Treasury Allocation to Boost Stablecoin Presence
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson has suggested using $100 million worth of ADA from the treasury to convert into Bitcoin and stablecoins, including USDM and USDA. This proposal aims to enhance the proportion of stablecoins within the Cardano ecosystem and its decentralized finance (DeFi) sector.

Hoskinson assured that this move would not negatively impact the ADA market and countered concerns about liquidity. Currently, stablecoins on the Cardano blockchain account for only about 10% of the total value locked (TVL), which is significantly lower compared to Solana's stablecoin ecosystem.

This proposal contrasts with the views of Cardano Foundation CEO Frederik Gregaard, who previously emphasized that TVL is not a critical metric for evaluating the ecosystem's success.

data.title: Pi Coin Price Prediction: Failed KYC? Broken Balances? Why This Mess Might Set Off a PI Supply Shock
data.description:
The Pi Coin price has plunged by 12% today, with its drop to $0.5525 coming after Israel launched airstrikes against Iran overnight.PI’s issues don’t end there, however, since the alt is also down by 16% in a fortnight and 53% in a month, while also suffering an 81.5% drop since reaching an ATH of $2

data.title: SharpLink Gaming fell 66.34% to $10.96
data.description:

It was previously reported that SharpLink Gaming, a US-listed company called "ETH version of MicroStrategy", spent $463 million to buy 176,271 ETH.

data.title: Israel-Iran tensions trigger over $7 million crypto betting volume spree on Polymarket
data.description:
The Israel-Iran conflict has triggered a wave of speculation across the crypto sector, with traders pouring millions into prediction markets. On Polymarket, a decentralized platform that allows users to wager on real-world outcomes, betting volume linked to the crisis has now exceeded $7 million across over 20 markets.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/israel-iran-tensions-trigger-over-7-million-crypto-betting-volume-spree-on-polymarket/

data.title: China shows no real signs of loosening rare earth monopoly
data.description:
Even as China signals it may issue more export permits for Europe and the United States, its tight grip on rare earth metals looks unlikely to loosen anytime soon, analysts warn. Three companies listed in Shenzhen announced this month that Beijing had approved their applications to ship magnets made with rare earths, elements essential for […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-not-loosening-rare-earth-monopoly/

data.title: The initial forecast for the US one-year inflation rate in June was 5.1%, while the expected rate was 6.4%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The initial forecast for the one-year inflation rate in the United States in June was 5.1%, the expected rate was 6.4%, and the previous value was 6.60%. (Jinshi)
